dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: What the proxy is holding right now — totals, headroom, and growth.
dashboard.evictedHint: This process only — resets on restart
dashboard.hitRateHint: Body origin · this process · resets on restart
dashboard.perProtocolHint: Objects and bytes currently held in the cache store.
dashboard.objectsNA: Not applicable: this cache is an opaque mirror (objects live inside packfiles), so only its size can be measured.
dashboard.chartsHint: In-memory metrics · per-replica · reset on restart.
dashboard.empty: Nothing cached yet — pull an artifact through the proxy, then this page fills in.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Every account on this install. Org-level roles live under Members.

edit.title: Edit user
edit.name: Name
edit.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password

remove.title: Delete user
remove.confirmSuffix: will be removed. This cannot be undone.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this organization and their role.
members.noOrg: No active organization. Select or create one from the switcher above.
members.lastOwnerHint: Last owner — cannot be removed or demoted. Transfer ownership to another member first.

addDialog.title: Add member
addDialog.description: The account must already exist. They will gain access immediately.

removeDialog.title: Remove member
removeDialog.description: Remove <0>{{email}}</0> from <1>{{org}}</1>? They will lose all access to this organization immediately.

org.title: Organization
org.name: Name
org.defaultVisibilityHint: New repos default to private — change per-repo in Repositories

tokens.title: Access tokens
tokens.subtitle: API keys for the registry and package manager proxies.
tokens.empty: No active tokens — create one above.

createDialog.title: New access token
createDialog.description: Tokens authenticate against the registry and all protocol proxies.
createDialog.label: Label
createDialog.scopesHint: At least one scope is required. Defaults to pull + push.

reveal.title: Token created
reveal.warnTitle: Save this token — it will not be shown again
reveal.warnBody: Once you close this dialog, the plaintext is permanently gone. Copy it to your password manager or CI secrets store before continuing.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke token
revokeDialog.description: Revoke <target/>? Any client using this token will lose access immediately and cannot be recovered — create a new token to replace it.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Live values, resolved override → config file → built-in default. Changes are persisted encrypted and shared by every replica.
settings.readOnlyBody: No master key is configured, so nothing can be persisted encrypted. Set <0>auth.config_secret</0> (or <1>SPECULA_AUTH__CONFIG_SECRET</1>) to the output of <2>openssl rand -base64 32</2> and restart. Until then, generated secrets are ephemeral: sessions do not survive a restart and are not valid across replicas.
settings.restartPendingBody: One or more changed settings do not take effect until Specula is restarted.

source.runtimeHint: Set at runtime and stored encrypted. This wins over the config file.
source.envHint: From specula.yaml or a SPECULA_* environment variable.
source.unsetHint: Not configured anywhere; the built-in default applies.

settings.secretHint: Redacted — the value is never sent to the browser.
settings.dangerHint: High risk: changing this can break live traffic. Confirmation required.
settings.restartToApplyHint: Changing this needs a restart before it takes effect.
settings.resetHint: Remove the override and fall back to the configured default
settings.secretPlaceholder: new value — leave empty to clear
settings.confirmBody: This is a high-risk setting. Type <0>{{key}}</0> to confirm.
settings.restartNote: Takes effect after a restart — the value is used to build a verifier at startup.

invitations.invitedBody: Accepting adds this account to the organisation. You will be able to switch to it from the organisation switcher.
invitations.acceptingAsHint: An invitation is addressed to one address. If this is not the invited one, sign in as that account first.
invitations.declinedBody: You declined this invitation. No membership was created.

error.network: Could not reach the server. Please retry.
error.wrongEmail: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Sign in as the invited account and open the link again.
error.notFound: This invitation link is not valid. Ask whoever invited you to send a new one.
error.used: This invitation has already been used. If you did not accept it, ask for a new one.
error.expired: This invitation has expired. Ask whoever invited you to send a new one.

dialog.title: Invite member
dialog.description: Creates a pending invitation. Nobody joins until they accept it themselves — unlike Add member, which grants access immediately.
dialog.roleHint: Ownership cannot be granted by invitation — an owner must confer it directly.
dialog.noToken: The server did not return an invitation token, so this link cannot be built.
dialog.createdDescription: Send this link to {{email}}. It is shown once — if you close this without copying it, you will have to create a new invitation. It expires in 7 days, and only {{email}} can accept it.

orgDialog.title: Create organization
orgDialog.description: You become its owner. Repositories you push live under its namespace, and you can invite others once it exists.
orgDialog.name: Organization name
orgDialog.namespaceHint: The namespace is derived from the name.
orgDialog.failed: Could not create the organization. Please retry.

noOrg.noneSelectedHint: Pick one from the switcher in the top bar to continue.
noOrg.notAMember: You are not a member of any organisation.
noOrg.notAMemberHint: Organisations are invitation-only — ask an administrator to invite this email address.

stub.title: Not implemented
stub.body: This route is scaffolded. The owning agent implements it in place.
